description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a futuristic, angular design with a low, wide profile and pronounced geometric surfaces. The front is equipped with two prominent forward-facing cannons and sharply pointed wing-like extensions, suggesting a focus on offensive capabilities. The cockpit area is heavily armored and recessed, flanked by raised panels and angular intakes or vents. The rear of the vehicle displays two large, hexagonal exhaust ports with orange highlights, indicating powerful propulsion or thruster systems. The side views reveal a compact, aerodynamic body with additional armor plating and integrated weapon mounts. The overall appearance is that of a heavily armored, high-mobility combat vehicle designed for urban tactical operations.
description: A futuristic, heavily armored combat vehicle with angular surfaces, forward-facing cannons, and large rear thrusters. Its design emphasizes offense, protection, and high mobility.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large cannons, angular armor, and a recessed cockpit flanked by wing-like extensions.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vehicle's low, aerodynamic profile, raised panels, and the length of the forward cannons.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals two large hexagonal thrusters with orange highlights and angular rear armor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the compact body, armor plating, and weapon mounts.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two large forward-facing cannon mounts integrated into the front lower section.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; especially reinforced at the front and cockpit area with sloped surfaces.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; exterior is solid gray and black.
